title: camellia biflora
intro: Camellia biflora, also known as the two-flowered camellia, is a species of flowering plant in the tea family (Theaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. In traditional herbal preparations, Camellia biflora is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
